headline: Data Centres Set to Drive Energy Transition - Hear from CBRE, Pure Data Centres and Other Industry Leaders at Data Centre LIVE London
summary: Attendees at a panel discussion at Sustainability LIVE: The US Summit (a BizClik LIVE event) London, 6 May 2026 – As global industries accelerate towards net zero, the data centre sector sits at the heart of the energy transition. Surging demand driven by AI and digital services is forcing operators to scale capacity while reducing environmental impact.
